purpose: Track exhaustive city/county DBA, fictitious business name, and local business license research. Broad NotebookLM research is not enough; each state must be split into county and municipality shards.

notebooklm.title: SOSFiler 50-State Formation and Change Filing Research

statuses.directory_needed: Need official county/municipality list before filing research.
statuses.researching: Official local pages are being gathered.
statuses.partial: Some local jurisdictions mapped; coverage incomplete.
statuses.mapped_official: Official pages and core filing rules are mapped.
statuses.implemented: Mapped local filings are wired into SOSFiler product/operator workflows.

coverage_rules: Use official county/city/state/government directories to enumerate jurisdictions.
Do not treat national commercial summaries as complete local coverage.

Record official URL, source type, filing owner, exact government fees, processing fees, publication fees or quote rules, renewal fees, amendment fees, closure fees, late fees, and variable fee formulas for each jurisdiction.
Mark price_confidence as verified, formula_verified, range_only, needs_operator_quote, or unknown.
Recommend a SOSFiler markup strategy only after the government fee and effort/risk are known.
Default unmapped jurisdictions to operator-assisted research.
phase_1_local_sequence: For each top-ten state, first enumerate official counties and municipalities.
Map county DBA/FBN/assumed-name filings and county business license/tax certificate paths.
Map city business license/business tax/zoning/home occupation paths.
Record exact fees, formulas, source URLs, renewal/amendment/closure rules, and price confidence.
Leave unmapped local jurisdictions operator-assisted until official evidence is found.

priority_shards.topic: Arizona official county and city DBA/trade name, county business license, city business license, transaction privilege tax/local licensing, zoning, home occupation, exact fees, renewals, amendments, closures, processing fees, source URLs, and price confidence

Official county clerk assumed name / DBA filings for all Texas counties, including exact initial filing fee, per-owner/name fees, copy/certified copy fees, online processing fee, renewal fee, amendment fee, abandonment/withdrawal fee, publication requirement/cost if any, source URL, and price confidence

Official city business licenses, business tax certificates, zoning clearance, and home occupation permits for Texas municipalities, including exact initial license fee, renewal fee, amendment/closure fee, revenue/employee/activity formulas, inspections, processing fees, source URL, and price confidence

Nevada state business license plus official county/city local business license, DBA/fictitious firm name, Clark County, Washoe County, Las Vegas, Reno, Henderson, fees, renewals, amendments, closures, processing fees, source URLs, and price confidence

Official county fictitious business name filings and publication requirements for all California counties, including exact filing fee, registrant/name fees, copy/certified copy fees, publication deadline, publication cost/quote handling, renewal, amendment, abandonment, processing fees, source URL, and price confidence

California official city business license/business tax certificate requirements for major municipalities and city directories, exact fees or formulas, renewals, amendments, closures, processing fees, source URLs, and price confidence
Delaware official state business license, local city/county business licenses, DBA/trade name paths, exact fees, renewals, amendments, closures, processing fees, source URLs, and price confidence

Official local business tax receipt requirements for Florida counties and municipalities, including exact tax receipt fee, renewal, transfer/amendment, closure, penalty, revenue/activity formulas, processing fees, source URL, and price confidence

Wyoming official county/city trade name DBA, local business license, business tax, zoning, home occupation requirements, exact fees, renewals, amendments, closures, processing fees, source URLs, and price confidence

New York official county business certificate DBA assumed name paths, publication/local licensing where applicable, NYC and major city business licensing, exact fees, renewals, amendments, closures, processing fees, source URLs, and price confidence
Georgia official county/city trade name DBA and occupation tax/business license paths, exact fees or formulas, renewals, amendments, closures, processing fees, source URLs, and price confidence

Illinois official county/city assumed name DBA and business license paths, Chicago and major municipalities, exact fees or formulas, renewals, amendments, closures, processing fees, source URLs, and price confidence

Nevada state business license, county/city business licenses, and Clark/Washoe local requirements, including exact government fees, renewals, amendments, closures, penalties, variable formulas, processing fees, source URL, and price confidence
